steps.title: Find where the original is minimized
steps.content:
For $f(x)=3x^2+54x+247$, the vertex gives the minimum because the quadratic opens upward.
$$x=-\frac{54}{2(3)}=-\frac{54}{6}=-9$$

steps.title: Shift the input
steps.content:
The function $g(x)=f(x+4)$ is minimized when the input to $f$ equals $-9$. Set $x+4$ equal to that value.
$$x+4=-9$$
$$x=-13$$
The answer is A.
